title: Deliciously Dense Ukrainian Lamb Dumplings
description: Pungent and springy lamb dumplings made with lamb mince and score-fat, perfect for a date-night dinner, and Whole30-friendly.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the lamb mince, score-fat, onion, garlic, egg, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Mix everything together with your hands or a wooden spoon until just combined.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
When ready to cook, bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Using your hands, shape the lamb mixture into small dumplings, about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
Gently add the dumplings to the boiling water and cook for 10-12 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
Remove the dumplings from the water with a slotted spoon and serve hot.
Serve with your favorite sides, such as sauteed spinach or roasted vegetables.
